The RayFancy Edge

Our product workflow focuses on practical model matching, sample confirmation, factory communication, and repeatable order support for trade buyers.

WENZHOU FACTORY
precision_manufacturing

Product Matching Support

Switches, sockets, plugs, power strips, lamp holders, and accessories can be matched by product type and target market.

history_edu

Sample Confirmation

Before bulk orders, product appearance, basic function, packaging direction, and model details can be confirmed through samples.

factory

Factory-Direct Supply

Direct communication with RayFancy helps buyers compare models, confirm order details, and prepare repeat supply more efficiently.

Product Collections

Prepared from RayFancy product categories for distributors, contractors, OEM buyers, and project procurement.

1 gang, 2 gang, and 3 gang wall switch options for product catalogs and project matching.
